user.title: Smart Heating Advisor — Ollama
user.description: Step 1 of 2 — Configure your local Ollama AI instance

influxdb.title: Smart Heating Advisor — InfluxDB
influxdb.description: Step 2 of 2 — Configure your InfluxDB 2.x connection. Once saved, add rooms using the **➕ Add Room** button on the integration card.

error.ollama_connection_failed: Cannot connect to Ollama or model not found. Check URL and model name.
error.influxdb_connection_failed: Cannot connect to InfluxDB. Check URL, token, org and bucket.

abort.already_configured: Smart Heating Advisor is already configured.

user.title: Add Room — Step 1/6: Room Identity
user.description: Select an HA Area to auto-detect entities, or enter a custom room name. Already-configured rooms are excluded.

data.room_name: Room name (leave blank to use area name)

trvs.title: Add Room — Step 2/6: Radiator Thermostats ({room_name})
trvs.description:
Select the TRVs (radiator thermostats) SHA should control for **{room_name}**.

**Main TRVs** are fully controlled by SHA. **Fixed TRVs** are kept at a constant setpoint (e.g. a bathroom towel rail).

data_description.fixed_trv_temp: Temperature setpoint for fixed TRVs. Only applies when Fixed TRVs are selected above.

windows.title: Add Room — Step 3/6: Windows & Airing ({room_name})
windows.description: Configure window sensors and airing mode for **{room_name}**. SHA will pause heating when a window is detected open.

data.airing_mode_enabled: Enable airing mode (pause heating when window open)
data.airing_duration_minutes: Minimum airing duration before resuming heating

temperature.title: Add Room — Step 4/6: Temperature Profile ({room_name})
temperature.description: Configure temperature sensing and standby temperature for **{room_name}**.

data.default_temp_enabled: Enable standby temperature (setback when schedule is off)

data_description.thermostat_sensor: Alternative sensor read by the TRV thermostat. Used by SHA for accuracy analysis.
data_description.default_temp: Temperature SHA sets when no schedule is active. Only applies when standby temperature is enabled.

humidity.title: Add Room — Step 5/6: Humidity Control ({room_name})
humidity.description: Optionally enable humidity monitoring for **{room_name}**. SHA will include humidity data in its AI analysis.

confirm.title: Add Room — Step 6/6: Confirm ({room_name})

error.room_already_exists: A room with this name is already configured in SHA. Use a different name.

abort.no_areas_available: No HA Areas are available to add. Either all areas are already configured in SHA, or no areas exist yet. Use the manual option to add a room without an area, or create areas first in Settings → Areas.

init.title: Smart Heating Advisor — Settings (1/2)
init.description: Update connection settings. Use **➕ Add Room** to add rooms, or **⋮** next to a room to remove it.

data_description.debug_logging: Writes detailed logs for entity creation, room discovery, InfluxDB queries, Ollama prompts and responses, and heating rate updates. Disable when not actively debugging.
data_description.influxdb_token: Changes to connection settings (Ollama, InfluxDB, weather entity) will trigger an integration reload.
data_description.ollama_url: Changes to connection settings (Ollama, InfluxDB, weather entity) will trigger an integration reload.

vacation.title: Smart Heating Advisor — Vacation Settings (2/2)
vacation.description: Configure vacation mode. When enabled, SHA uses a reduced heating profile while you are away.

data_description.vacation_calendar: When set, SHA will automatically activate vacation mode during calendar events. Leave blank to control vacation mode manually.
data_description.vacation_mode: Heating strategy to apply when vacation mode is active.
